title: Add kneighbors_graph and radius_neighbors_graph (free fns + methods) plus sort_graph_by_row_values
description:
sklearn module-level functions:
- kneighbors_graph(X, n_neighbors, mode='connectivity', metric='minkowski', p=2, metric_params=None, include_self=False, n_jobs=None)
- radius_neighbors_graph(X, radius, mode='connectivity', metric='minkowski', p=2, metric_params=None, include_self=False, n_jobs=None)
- sort_graph_by_row_values(graph, copy=True, warn_when_not_sorted=True)

Plus methods on every kneighbors-capable estimator:
- FittedKNeighbors{Classifier,Regressor,...}.kneighbors_graph
- FittedRadiusNeighbors{...}.radius_neighbors_graph

Returns a sparse CSR-style adjacency matrix. ferrolearn-sparse already has sparse types. mode='connectivity' → 0/1 matrix; mode='distance' → distance values.
